$comment: SWA config for PRODUCTION (BUILD_SPEC §4/§14). Locks the origin to Azure Front Door: direct hits on the *.azurestaticapps.net hostname must return 403. __FRONT_DOOR_ID__ is injected at build by scripts/generate-swa-config.mjs from the FRONT_DOOR_ID variable — the build fails if it is missing. Shared headers/caching must stay in sync with preview.json.

globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
